economic_hypothesis: When independent sleeves on different futures markets emit same-direction opportunities within the preceding 60 minutes, the shared participation state should raise target velocity enough to justify exactly two risk units, because synchronized cross-market demand is harder to explain by one sleeve's local geometry than an isolated trigger.

available_at_decision: decision timestamps and directions of other frozen sleeve intents at or before the current decision
past-only account balance, MLL buffer, daily realized PnL and open exposure

falsification_rule: If the preregistered paired family tripwire is not green, tombstone only CONTEMPORANEOUS_CROSS_MARKET_OPPORTUNITY_DENSITY_V1. Do not rescue it by changing the 60-minute window, confirmation count, risk units or thresholds after outcomes.
CONTRE: Different markets can share index beta and clock-time clustering, so apparent confirmation may still be common geometry. The class is supported only if the real confirmation graph beats its degree-matched source permutation under stressed costs without unacceptable MLL or consistency deterioration.
